title: Addis Linen Cutlery Drainer With Removable Compartment
features: Plastic cutlery drainer with removable inner compartment
5 Compartments - Perfect For Separating Your Cutlery
BPA Free - Made In The UK
Addis - Part of the home since 1780
description: From the manufacturer Made For Life. Addis part of the home since 1780, based in UK. Addis has a 240+ year old history of design, manufacturing and supplying of housewares. The Addis brand still stands today - as it has for previous generations - for value and quality. BPA Free This cutlery drainer is made from BPA Free plastic and is completely safe from any harsh chemicals. 5 Compartments This cutlery drainer has 5 compartments which allows you to categorise your cutlery into sections as they drain. Aesthetic The aesthetic design of this cutlery drainer allows for easy drainage whilst complimenting any sink side area.
